CWNCE.Settings.ShowExactAc.Name: Show exact target AC to players
CWNCE.Settings.ShowExactAc.Hint: When enabled, players see the target's exact melee or ranged AC. GMs always see exact AC.
CWNCE.Chat.Heading: Target Check
CWNCE.Chat.NoTargets: No targets were selected when this attack was rolled.
CWNCE.Chat.TargetUnavailable: A captured target is no longer available.
